creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Xin LI from comment #3)
(In reply to Palle Girgensohn from comment #9)

Thanks for the fix.

BTW, the build problem only occurs with newer Clang, e.g. Clang 16 on FreeBSD 14.
IMO, the PORTREVISION bump is not needed since the package was not available.
